__fixture__.name: imported_artifact_provenance_conflict
__fixture__.scenario: Imported artifact row launch preserving import-source and partial-fidelity context when the imported object collides with existing local state.

title: Imported artifact conflicts with existing local provenance

source_object.object_summary: The packet preserves one imported artifact row because the provenance conflict only appears on this concrete imported object.

current_state_rows.summary: The imported record is only partially representable in the current client.
The displayed path is an imported snapshot projection, not canonical authored workspace truth.
Manual review is required before the imported object can replace local state.

build_context.build_summary: The packet records the exact client build so support can compare the imported schema and local restore vocabulary precisely.

route_context.route_summary: The packet comes from the imported-artifact preview path before any local state mutation is applied.

scope_and_boundary_context.scope_summary: The source object is an imported snapshot projection and not an already-applied local profile.

provenance_bindings.note: Portable profile file that produced the imported row.
Restore session tracking the import review.
Optional support bundle preserving local restore metadata.

evidence_and_recovery_context.consent_summary: Only the restore diff and support-bundle refs are exported; the imported payload body stays local.

destination_context.destination_summary: The imported-artifact handoff is routed to private support because the conflict depends on local restore state and imported private data classes.

export_safe_summary: Preserves the imported artifact id, import-source ref, restore-session ref, and private support route for a provenance conflict.
user_selected_note: The preview says the imported profile would overwrite machine-local settings with no exact provenance match.
